			"C_o":443.093,
			"a":9.83942e-05,
			"C_x":2316.13,
			"iter":2,
			"sei":0.10245,
			"ses":0.00310456,
			"r2":0.985094,
			"slope":0.184296,
			"domain":54,
			"n":55
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
